creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
For base, I have this error during buildworld with patch version 2:

--- iconv_compat.So ---
/poudriere/jails/headamd64PR199099/usr/src/lib/libc/iconv/iconv_compat.c:63:24: error: passing 'const char **restrict' to parameter of type 'char **' discards qualifiers in nested pointer types [-Werror,-Wincompatible-pointer-types-discards-qualifiers]
        return __bsd_iconv(a, b, c, d, e);
                              ^
/poudriere/jails/headamd64PR199099/usr/src/lib/libc/iconv/iconv-internal.h:36:47: note: passing argument to parameter here
size_t  __bsd_iconv(iconv_t, char ** __restrict,
                                               ^
1 error generated.
